sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3632" key="a)krosi/dhros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρο-σίδηρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3632.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pointed</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tipped with iron,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.95</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
